10. Heritage Halloween & Magic in the Park

    Email: strathearnadmin@rsrpd.us

11. Magic of the Jack O Lanterns
    Date: Various dates in September through November 2024
    Email: lahelp@magicofthejackolanterns.com

12. Queen Mary's Dark Harbor
    Date: Various dates from September through October 31, 2024
    Email: HELP@DARKHARBORHALLOWEEN.COM

13. Halloween Art Walk
    Date: October 5, 2024
    Email: Not provided

14. Bu Bash – Halloween Carnival Spooktacular
    Date: October 25, 2024
    Email: ARigali@malibucity.org

Note: Some events didn't have email addresses provided in the original data. For those, I've listed "Not provided" in the email field.
